case_title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. VS. HECTOR R ARRIAZA

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARRIAZA, HECTOR R $7,516.15 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,516.15, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 210022773)
